text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder displays incredible skill in a
pre-debut scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The media in attendance compare her to
Maruzensky, a racer known as the "Beast."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder refuses to play second fiddle, and
resolves to overcome her upperclassman.
